title: Create GH issue for agent-scoped sessions

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Plan: Create a GH issue proposing that crosslink sessions be scoped to individual agents rather than shared globally. Currently sessions are stored in the local SQLite db without agent affinity, which causes conflicts when multiple agents share a worktree or when sessions are synced at the hub level.

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Created GH issue #81: https://github.com/forecast-bio/crosslink/issues/81 — proposes adding agent_id column to sessions table, scoping all session queries to current agent, with backward-compatible migration.
